description: Figure S1: SDS PAGE analysis of protein 041 synthesis in  E. coli  BL21 (DE3) cells. Table S1: Primers used for cloning of truncated 041 gene variants. Figure S2: TEM analysis of nanotubes of recombinant protein 041 and its truncated variants. Figure S3: Thermostability of 041Δ200YqfB and YqfB after 2 and 24 h of incubation.
